title: stelis dracontea
intro: Stelis dracontea, also known as the "dragon's tongue," is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Stelis dracontea include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Stelis dracontea typically involve drying and powdering the plant's roots or leaves, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal use.
